title: IndexNow Search Indexing Accelerator Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip -o indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip && unzip -o indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip -d ./indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator

Usage:
Use this skill to standardize indexing signals for newly published or updated pages and reduce crawl lag.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Apply the IndexNow indexing accelerator skill to this publishing pipeline."

# Required output
1) URL submission strategy
2) Sitemap and robots consistency checks
3) Search console/webmaster verification steps
4) Monitoring and retry policy
detailMarkdown:
# IndexNow Search Indexing Accelerator Skill

Accelerate search discovery and indexing updates with IndexNow-aware publishing workflows and crawl-efficient update signaling.

- **Category:** skills
- **Author:** JSONbored
- **Verification:** draft
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `indexnow` `seo` `indexing` `sitemap` `search`

## Install
```bash
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip -o indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip && unzip -o indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator.zip -d ./indexnow-search-indexing-accelerator
```

## Usage
Use this skill to standardize indexing signals for newly published or updated pages and reduce crawl lag.
